RuntimeConfig.description: Runtime limits and timeouts applied by manager and runner.

boot_plugin_gc_enabled.description: Whether plugin cache GC runs at manager boot.

boot_restore_enabled.description: Whether restart-policy boot restore runs at manager boot.

committed_session_ttl_secs.description: TTL for committed upload sessions that have not been consumed by deploy.

deploy_stream_timeout_secs.description: Timeout for deployment stream operations in seconds.

anyOf.description: true enables all built-in native plugins; false keeps only the default set
Additional built-in native plugin package names enabled beyond the default set

features.description: Built-in native plugin loading policy for runner startup.

http_queue_memory_budget_bytes.description: Total memory budget for queued HTTP request bodies in bytes.

http_worker_count.description: Compatibility knob forwarded to runner bootstrap (runtime currently uses one worker task).

http_worker_queue_capacity.description: Upper bound for HTTP request queue capacity.

manager_control_read_timeout_ms.description: Read timeout for manager control channel operations in milliseconds.

max_artifact_size_bytes.description: Upper bound for accepted artifact archive size.

max_committed_sessions.description: Upper bound for committed upload sessions retained in manager memory.

max_concurrent_sessions.description: Upper bound of concurrently active sessions managed by imagod.

max_inflight_chunks.description: Max concurrent chunk writes per upload session.

retained_logs_capacity_bytes.description: Total capacity for retained logs from stopped services in bytes.

runner_log_buffer_bytes.description: Total per-runner log ring capacity in bytes.

stop_grace_timeout_secs.description: Grace period for service stop before forced kill.

transport_keepalive_interval_secs.description: QUIC transport keepalive interval in seconds.

transport_max_idle_timeout_secs.description: QUIC transport max idle timeout in seconds.

wasm_guard_before_linear_memory.description: Whether Wasmtime reserves a guard region before linear memory.

wasm_memory_guard_size_bytes.description: Wasmtime linear-memory guard size in bytes.

wasm_memory_reservation_bytes.description: Wasmtime linear-memory reservation size in bytes.

wasm_memory_reservation_for_growth_bytes.description: Wasmtime extra reservation size for linear-memory growth in bytes.

wasm_parallel_compilation.description: Whether Wasmtime compiles modules in parallel.

TlsConfig.description: TLS material locations for raw public key mTLS server startup.

client_public_keys.description: Allowlist of client Ed25519 raw public keys (32-byte hex).

known_public_keys.description: TOFU-known remote authorities mapped to Ed25519 raw public key hex.

server_key.description: Server private key in PEM format.

description: TOML document model for `imagod.toml` including optional JSON Schema reference.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL used by editors for completion/validation.

control_socket_path.description: Local Unix socket path used for SSH-bridged control requests.

server_version.description: Server version reported via negotiate response.

storage_root.description: Storage root used for artifacts, runtime state, and releases.

title: ImagodTomlDocument
